caption: An older man with grey hair and glasses stands at a podium, speaking into a microphone. He is wearing a blue short-sleeved button-down shirt featuring a pattern of eagles and a colorful horizontal band across the chest. He also wears a necklace with light-colored beads. He stands before a backdrop of light-brown horizontal wooden slats. The podium has a white sign with a red logo and the text "Kellogg Whitehall" followed by "DONORS" underneath. To the right of the man, a white box containing the text "ORCA" is visible on the screen. In the beginning, the man is speaking with his mouth open, but as time progresses, he brings his right hand up toward his chin and mouth, appearing to pause or gesture while speaking. Other people are partially visible in the foreground, though only the backs of their heads are shown.
